steps.t: Galadriel is waiting for you in the centre of the garden. You have been summoned to Galadriel's garden in Lothlórien, for she hopes to speak with you.
The Mirror of Galadriel is in the centre of her garden. Galadriel has invited you to gaze into her Mirror to see what you will.
Galadriel is waiting for you in the centre of the garden. You have seen strange sights within the Mirror of Galadriel, including confusing images of G…
Gwaihir the Windlord has come to rest in Galadriel's garden. Galadriel has asked you to speak with Gwaihir concerning the fate of Gandalf the Grey.
